title: Operations Executive (Automotive – Post-Sales Execution)
description:
The Sales & Operations Executive supports the end-to-end execution of all sales activities after the signing of the Vehicle Sales Agreement (VSA). This role focuses on operational follow-through, customer coordination, documentation control, and balance payment tracking to ensure timely deal closure and high-quality vehicle delivery.

Key Responsibilities

Post-Sales Administration & Follow-Up

  • Track all signed VSAs and maintain an accurate execution pipeline.

  • Follow up with customers on outstanding balance payments, financing approvals, and required documentation.

  • Coordinate with Sales Consultants (SCs) to ensure timely completion of customer commitments.

Execution & Delivery Coordination

  • Arrange and coordinate vehicle inspections, PDI, logistics movements, and delivery handovers.

  • Prepare and verify all delivery documentation, ensuring completeness and accuracy.

  • Support customer communications on delivery timelines and outstanding requirements.

Operational Support

  • Update internal systems and trackers on payment status, delivery readiness, and exceptions.

  • Flag ageing cases, risks, or discrepancies to the Sales & Operations Manager early.

  • Assist in resolving operational issues, customer queries, or internal escalations.

Process Compliance

  • Ensure all activities are carried out in accordance with internal SOPs and compliance standards.

  • Maintain proper filing and records for audit and reporting purposes.

Reporting & Coordination

  • Prepare daily and weekly operational status reports.

  • Liaise with Finance, Credit, Logistics, and Service teams on execution matters.

  • Any other ad hoc operational duties as assigned.

Job Requirements

  • Diploma in Business Administration, Operations, Logistics, or related field.

  • 1–3 years of experience in automotive operations, sales administration, customer service, or similar roles.

  • Strong attention to detail and high level of responsibility in handling payments and documents.

  • Well-organised, able to manage multiple cases concurrently under deadlines.

  • Good communication skills, comfortable dealing with both customers and sales staff.

  • Proficient in Microsoft Excel and basic reporting tools.

  • Experience with CRM or dealer management systems is an advantage.

postedCompany.description: BYD by 1826, we are at the forefront of delivering exceptional experiences in the hospitality and automotive retail industries, boasting premium restaurants and BYD showrooms. Our mission is to enhance operational efficiency and customer satisfaction through cutting-edge technology and innovative design.
